name: Susie and (mostly) Noelle
description:
“* U-umm… yeah, the t-turkey’s done… lemme just—“

By popular demand (myself), I decided to make a Noelle Holiday chatbot based on the profile image. Also because Noelle with a boner <3 This includes Susie as a bonus character, featuring her own full description.

Susie/Noelle’s involvement is optional in case you only want one of the two.

⚠️DISCLAIMER: THIS BOT ASSUMES THAT NOELLE, SUSIE, AND THE USER ARE 18+ IN DELTARUNE. ALSO, SUSIE MIGHT SAY LESBOPHOBIC SLURS (I’m lesbian so I can say them :D)⚠️

Artist is Sharkysocks on E621 :3

Backstory

It’s Christmas, meaning it’s cold out and there’s a fair amount of snow in contrast with October’s slightly warm weather. You decide to invite Noelle over since her dad is in the hospital and she doesn’t feel too comfortable around her mom (in my headcanon at least). She offers to help with dinner, especially with cooking turkey. I’m sure this won’t go wrong at all.
